Precision Health, Personalized for You
Our precision-crafted, data-powered platform helps people live better, longer, stronger — setting the gold standard in personalized medicine and unlocking the full potential of modern health.
Start My Health Journey Today

Members Served
OUR METHOD
We lead the Performance Health Age Management industry, empowering everyone to improve their healthspan.
How it works
1
Complimentary Consultation
Schedule a complimentary strategy session to review your biomarkers, discuss your performance goals, and create your personalized healthspan blueprint.
2
Your Phlebotomist Comes to You
We measure over 100 biomarkers to establish your health baseline.
3
Performance Health Assessment
A full day of assessments, including a detailed review with your Cenegenics physician to ensure all questions are answered.
4
Personalized Program
Your Performance Health Team utilizes biofeedback collected through follow-up testing to keep you on track year-round.
Schedule Your Phone Consultation
We look forward to connecting with you.
CENEGENICS PROGRAM BENEFITS
Precision Health. Real Results. More Years of Vital Performance.
Maximize Energy
Sustain peak vitality through improved metabolism and cellular efficiency.
Build Muscle
Increase lean mass and metabolic strength with precision training and balance.
Restore Vitality
Reignite natural energy, performance, and sexual vitality by supporting key biological systems.
Sharpen Cognition
Enhance clarity, focus, and mental stamina with precision health strategies.
Enhance Sleep
Restore deep, consistent rest by improving circadian rhythm and recovery.
Elevate Resilience
Fortify your body’s stress response through restorative recovery and hormonal alignment.
Cenegenics Defined
Precision diagnostics. Concierge care. Measurable improvements in biological age and healthspan.
Read More
How We Help
Your partner in living stronger for longer – through in-home diagnostics, expert physician attention, and a data-driven blueprint for lifelong performance.

Skip to content
About Cenegenics
At Cenegenics, we redefine healthcare to maximize healthspan and improve the various biomarkers of longevity. Since 1997, we’ve led thousands to achieve more with their lives.
Today’s healthcare treats problems. We prevent them.
We provide unmatched clinical care and personalized attention.
Our team of longevity specialists helps you understand your body and health in precise detail using state-of-the-art science and diagnostics.
Complimentary Consultation
Your Performance Health Team
Your team includes direct access to your Cenegenics physician, performance health coach, coordinator, and phlebotomist. Our members gain deep insights into their health, identify risks, and benefit from a dedicated team focused on achieving their healthspan and longevity goals.A measure of the physiologic response to evoke potential to assess neurological performance.
Get Started
